text: <par><latinform>tʻok</latinform> means “hammer, malleate, knock” . See LTSR #15 *<latinform>tok</latinform>, WT <latinform>thogs</latinform> “strike against” .</par>
<par>Lepcha <latinform>da</latinform> is a reflexive morpheme (cf. Lahu <latinform>dàʔ</latinform> < PTB <reconstruction>*m-dak</reconstruction>). See HPTB pp. 318, 320.</par>
<par>Lepcha <latinform>să-ro</latinform> is the origin of English <emph>serao</emph> or <emph>serow</emph> 'wild mountain goat'.</par>
